# About Jayant Verma

Jayant Verma is an AI/ML Engineer specializing in Agentic AI, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LLM infrastructure, Voice AI, and production AI systems. He has worked as a core member of the AI team at Cyfuture India Pvt. Ltd., where he has designed, built, and deployed enterprise AI solutions used across multiple business domains.

His work focuses on turning AI concepts into production-ready systems rather than building research prototypes. He has extensive hands-on experience with AI platform engineering, multi-agent architectures, LLM deployment, model serving, AI observability, and cloud-native AI infrastructure.

## Professional Experience

### AI/ML Engineer — Cyfuture India Pvt. Ltd.

August 2024 – Present

As part of Cyfuture's AI team, Jayant has worked on:

* Agentic AI platforms
* Enterprise AI assistants
* RAG systems
* Voice AI solutions
* LLM hosting and serving infrastructure
* Fine-tuning platforms
* Kubernetes-based AI deployments
* GPU infrastructure and optimization

He has contributed to AI products involving customer support automation, intelligent knowledge retrieval, voice agents, autonomous workflows, and enterprise AI platforms.

## Areas of Expertise

### Agentic AI

Jayant has designed and implemented agent-based systems using frameworks such as LangGraph and modern agent orchestration patterns.

His experience includes:

* Multi-agent workflows
* Tool calling
* Human-in-the-loop systems
* Agent memory
* Agent observability
* MCP-based integrations
* Autonomous business workflows

### Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)

He has built production RAG systems involving:

* Vector databases
* Chunking strategies
* Hybrid retrieval
* Metadata filtering
* Context management
* Retrieval evaluation
* Enterprise knowledge bases

He is comfortable discussing retrieval architectures, chunking tradeoffs, embedding models, evaluation techniques, and production challenges.

### LLM Infrastructure

Jayant has worked extensively on deploying and operating large language models in production environments.

Technologies include:

* vLLM
* KServe
* Ray Serve
* Kubernetes
* Docker
* GPU infrastructure
* Distributed inference systems

He has experience serving models such as:

* Llama family
* GPT-OSS
* Mistral
* Whisper
* BERT-family models
* Vision-language models

### Voice AI

One of Jayant's major focus areas is conversational Voice AI.

His work includes:

* Telephonic AI agents
* Whisper ASR
* Text-to-Speech systems
* Real-time voice pipelines
* Asterisk PBX integration
* Agentic voice workflows

He has built voice systems capable of handling real-time conversations with low latency while integrating retrieval and tool usage.

### Speech & TTS

Jayant has worked on multilingual Text-to-Speech training and fine-tuning systems using XTTS v2.

His experience includes:

* Multilingual speech datasets
* Indic language processing
* Text normalization
* BPE vocabulary extension
* Distributed training
* Evaluation pipelines
* Large-scale TTS experimentation

### AI Platforms

He enjoys building reusable AI platforms that enable multiple teams to deploy, manage, evaluate, and operate AI systems.

His interests include:

* AI platform engineering
* AI observability
* Model lifecycle management
* Evaluation systems
* Developer tooling
* Agent infrastructure

## Major Projects

### Enterprise Multi-Agent AI Platform

Built a platform supporting:

* Multi-agent workflows
* ReAct reasoning
* Human-in-the-loop controls
* Persistent state management
* Real-time streaming
* Enterprise deployment

### Telephonic Voice AI Agent

Developed a real-time Voice AI system integrating:

* Speech-to-Text
* LLM reasoning
* Tool calling
* Retrieval systems
* Text-to-Speech
* Telephony infrastructure

### LLM Infrastructure Platform

Designed and operated production infrastructure for:

* Model serving
* Fine-tuning
* Inference optimization
* GPU utilization
* Kubernetes deployments

### MiniSense

A multi-agent customer intelligence platform demonstrating:

* Agent orchestration
* RAG pipelines
* Survey analytics
* Explainable AI workflows
* AI observability
* Executive insights

* Python

* JavaScript

AI & ML:

* MongoDB
* FAISS
* Vector Databases
* S3-Compatible Storage

Speech:

* Whisper
* XTTS v2
* Voice AI Systems
* Speech Processing

## Career Direction

Jayant is focused on building the next generation of AI systems, especially in:

* Agentic AI
* Enterprise AI Platforms
* Voice AI
* Multimodal AI
* AI Infrastructure
* Autonomous Systems

He is particularly interested in roles where he can combine AI engineering, platform architecture, and product thinking to deliver real-world impact.

## Personal Interests

Outside of work, Jayant enjoys cricket, badminton, sketching, technology exploration, and studying emerging AI research and infrastructure systems.
